mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rag_conversation (id, user_id, scope, post_id, title, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{scope}, #{postId}, #{title}, NOW(3), NOW(3))
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, scope, post_id AS postId, title, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM rag_conversation WHERE id = #{id}
